_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of erythrocyte p55/MPP1 as a binding partner of NF2 tumor suppressor protein/Merlin.

_contextSnippet: along with the markers for both myelin-forming and non-myelin-forming Schwann cells (S100)...Merlin clearly colocalized with the S100 and GFAP markers
details: Successfully used as marker for both myelin-forming and non-myelin-forming Schwann cells in rat sciatic nerve immunofluorescence, showed colocalization with merlin
